message:
chore: update telegram connector and sync workspace dependencies

connectors/telegram/connector.rs:
- Improve connection handling and reconnection logic

Cargo.toml & Cargo.lock:
- Update workspace dependencies
- Add new optional feature flags

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Sync bead tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,6 +31,7 @@ members = [
     "connectors/openai",
     "connectors/telegram",
     "connectors/twitter",
+    "connectors/vectordb",
 ]
 
 # Default to the FCP2 platform core crates (connectors are explicitly targeted).
